title: Cobblemon Badges
description:
A simple resource pack that adds a badge for every typing.
Cobblemon Badges
body:
A simple resource pack that adds a badge for every typing.
Remodels popped chorus fruits to look like these badges

Obtaining these badges are only available with commands for now.
Thank you to Zalati for creating a website to get the commands for all different badges and customizing these with names, text colors and lore:
https://zalati.fr/cobblemon/

Go to https://cobblemon-badge-viewer.stinus0.workers.dev/cobblemon for a simpler website with the new custom badges which have been created for my friends cobblemon server

Be sure to check their website out at https://zalati.fr/ , where they have links to their socials!
